test_cases.title: Senior Java Backend Engineer - Fintech
test_cases.jdText:
Position: Senior Backend Engineer (Java / Spring Boot)
Location: Remote / Bangalore

About the Role:
We are looking for a Seasoned Backend Engineer to join our core banking squad. You will be responsible for building highly scalable microservices that process millions of transactions per second.

Requirements:
- 5+ years of experience with Java (JDK 17 preferred).
- Expert knowledge of Spring Framework, Spring Boot, and Spring Security.
- Strong experience with PostgreSQL and database optimization (indexing, query tuning).
- Proven track record with Microservices architecture and RESTful API design.
- Experience with Docker and Kubernetes for container orchestration.
- Familiarity with CI/CD pipelines (Jenkins/GitLab CI) and cloud platforms like AWS or GCP.
- Excellent problem-solving skills and a focus on clean, maintainable code (SOLID principles).

Nice to have:
- Experience with Kafka or RabbitMQ.
- Knowledge of GraphQL.
test_cases.resumeText:
LEAD BACKEND DEVELOPER
Summary: 7 years of expertise in Java-based system architecture and microservices development.

Technical Skills:
Languages: Java 8/11/17, Python, SQL
Frameworks: Spring Boot, Spring Data JPA, Hibernate, Express.js
Databases: PostgreSQL, MySQL, Redis
DevOps: Docker, Jenkins, Git, Bitbucket
Architecture: REST APIs, Microservices, MVC

Experience Highlights:
- Developed a real-time payment processing engine using Spring Boot and Postgres.
- Migrated legacy monolithic services into a microservices-based architecture.
- Optimized DB queries resulting in a 40% reduction in API response times.
- Mentored junior developers and enforced TDD practices.

test_cases.title: Frontend Architect - E-commerce
test_cases.jdText:
Frontend Specialist (React / TypeScript)

We need a Frontend Architect to lead the development of our next-gen headless commerce platform. You will build reusable components, manage complex state, and ensure pixel-perfect responsive designs.

Key Qualifications:
- Advanced proficiency in React.js and modern React patterns (Hooks, Context API).
- Strong TypeScript skills are mandatory.
- Expert in Tailwind CSS and CSS-in-JS solutions.
- Experience with state management libraries like Redux Toolkit or Recoil.
- Familiarity with Next.js and Server-Side Rendering (SSR).
- Testing experience with Vitest, Jest, and Playwright.
- Understanding of web performance optimization and accessibility (WCAG).
test_cases.resumeText:
SENIOR FRONTEND ENGINEER
Creative developer focused on building high-performance web applications with React.

Skills:
Frontend: React, JavaScript (ES6+), HTML5, CSS3, SASS, Bootstrap
State: Redux, Context API
Build Tools: Webpack, Vite, NPM, Yarn
Version Control: Git, GitHub

Work History:
- Built a custom dashboard for data visualization using React and D3.js.
- Implemented mobile-first designs with Bootstrap and custom CSS animations.
- Integrated RESTful services with frontend state using Redux.

test_cases.title: Fullstack Developer - SaaS Startup
test_cases.jdText:
Full Stack Developer (Node.js & React)

Join our fast-paced startup to build end-to-end features for our project management tool. You will work across the entire stack, from UI components to database schemas.

Skills Required:
- Node.js and Express.js for backend services.
- React for the frontend ecosystem.
- Experience with MongoDB or similar NoSQL databases.
- Proficiency in JavaScript and TypeScript.
- Knowledge of Docker and basic cloud deployment (AWS/Heroku).
- Experience with Firebase authentication and real-time databases.
- Strong UI/UX sensibilities.
test_cases.resumeText:
JUNIOR FULLSTACK DEVELOPER
Self-taught developer with a passion for building full-stack applications.

Technologies:
Backend: JavaScript, Node.js, Express, MongoDB
Frontend: React, HTML, CSS, Tailwind CSS
Tools: Git, Postman, MongoDB Compass

Projects:
- E-commerce Store: Built using React and Node.js with Stripe integration.
- Real-time Chat App: Used Socket.io and Firebase for live messaging.
- Personal Portfolio: Responsive design built with Tailwind CSS.

test_cases.title: DevOps Engineer - Infrastructure
test_cases.jdText:
Role: DevOps / Site Reliability Engineer

We are scaling our infrastructure and need an expert to automate everything. You will manage our cloud footprint and ensure 99.9% uptime.

Core Responsibilities:
- Manage AWS infrastructure components (EC2, S3, RDS, Lambda).
- Implement Infrastructure as Code (IaC) using Terraform or CloudFormation.
- Manage Kubernetes clusters (EKS/GKE).
- Build and maintain Jenkins or GitHub Actions pipelines.
- Monitor system health using Prometheus, Grafana, or ELK stack.
- Implement security best practices and compliance controls.
- Scripting with Python, Bash, or Go.
test_cases.resumeText:
SRE / DEVOPS TECHNICIAN
Infrastructure specialist focused on automation and CI/CD.

Experience:
- Set up CI/CD pipelines using GitHub Actions for various Node.js projects.
- Managed AWS EC2 instances and S3 buckets for static site hosting.
- Experience with Bash scripting for server automation.
- Familiarity with Docker containerization and Docker Hub.

test_cases.title: Data Engineer - Analytics Platform
test_cases.jdText:
Data Engineer (Python / Spark / SQL)

We need a Data Engineer to build multi-terabyte data pipelines and manage our modern data stack. You will be responsible for ETL processes and data warehousing architecture.

Requirements:
- Strong Python programming skills (NumPy, Pandas, PySpark).
- Experience with Big Data technologies: Apache Spark, Hadoop, or Flink.
- Expert in SQL and data warehouse design (Snowflake, BigQuery, or Redshift).
- Experience with workflow orchestration tools like Airflow or Prefect.
- Familiarity with data modeling and governance.
- Basic knowledge of Scala or Java is a plus.
test_cases.resumeText:
DATA ANALYST
Detail-oriented analyst transitioning into data engineering.

Skills:
Languages: Python, SQL, R
Tools: Tableau, Excel, PowerBI, Jupyter Notebooks
Databases: MySQL, SQL Server
Libraries: Pandas, Matplotlib, Scikit-learn

Accomplishments:
- Automated monthly reporting using Python and Pandas, saving 20 hours per month.
- Designed complex SQL queries to extract insights from transactional data.
- Built a customer segmentation model using k-means clustering.
